name: NoFearActStatistic
description: Federal employee antidiscrimination and retaliation complaint statistics reported under the No FEAR Act by the US Commission on Civil Rights.

fiscal_year.description: Federal fiscal year for this reporting period.

basis.description: Discrimination basis category for this statistic.

complaints_filed.description: Number of complaints filed during the reporting period.

complaints_pending.description: Number of complaints pending at end of reporting period.

complaints_resolved.description: Number of complaints resolved during the reporting period.

findings_of_discrimination.description: Number of findings of discrimination during the reporting period.

monetary_benefits.description: Total monetary benefits paid in dollars during the reporting period.
